revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Izumotakanono Shrine
| native_name = 出雲高野神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Izumotakanono Shrine
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Izumotakanono Shrine'''|出雲高野神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11467693|ltq=Q11467693|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}}
** Series ordinal: 36
** P155: {{ill|Shimogamo Shrine|lt=Shimogamo Shrine|ca|Santuari de Shimogamo|en|Shimogamo Shrine|eo|Sanktejo Ŝimogamo|es|Santuario Shimogamo|eu|Shimogamo santutegia|fa|معبد شیموگامو|fi|Shimogamo-jinja|fr|Shimogamo-jinja (Kyoto)|id|Kuil Shimogamo|ja|賀茂御祖神社|ko|가모미오야 신사|la|Templum Simogamo|my|ရှိမိုဂမိုနတ်ကျောင်း|pl|Shimogamo-jinja|pt|Kamomioya-jinja|ru|Симогамо-дзиндзя|simple|Shimogamo Shrine|sl|Svetišče Šimogamo|th|ศาลเจ้าชิโมงาโมะ|tr|Shimogamo Tapınağı|zh|賀茂御祖神社|qid=Q701620|1=Shimogamo Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135038774|ltq=Q135038774|qid=Q135038774|1=Kamoyamaguchino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Yamashiro Province|lt=Yamashiro Province|cs|Provincie Jamaširo|de|Provinz Yamashiro|en|Yamashiro Province|es|Provincia de Yamashiro|fa|ولایت یاماشیرو|fr|Province de Yamashiro|gl|Provincia de Yamashiro|hak|Yamashiro-koet|id|Provinsi Yamashiro|it|Yamashiro (provincia)|ja|山城国|ko|야마시로국|lt|Jamaširo žemė|ms|Yamashiro Province|nl|Yamashiro (provincie)|pt|Província de Yamashiro|ru|Ямасиро (провинция)|simple|Yamashiro Province|sk|Jamaširo (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамаширо|tr|Yamashiro (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямашіро|wuu|山城国|zh_min_nan|Yamasiro-kok|zh_yue|山城國|zh|山城國|qid=Q749276|1=Yamashiro Province}}
* {{ill|Q10981345|ltq=Q10981345|qid=Q10981345|1=Otagi district}}
